positive: A cyberpunk pet portrait of a Shiba Inu wearing futuristic glowing cybernetic gear. The dog is standing in a rainy, neon-lit alleyway with holographic signs reflecting off the wet ground. High contrast, cinematic lighting, Japanese ukiyo-e meets cyberpunk aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
